mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FIXED_SCAN (store, mainBarcode, uploadDate, scanDate, scanCount) VALUES (#{store}, #{mainBarcode}, #{uploadDate}, #{scanDate}, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE scanCount = scanCount + 1
mapper.select: SELECT r.store, r.mainBarcode, c.product, c.location, r.qty, r.vip, r.vipLocation, r.uploadDate, IFNULL(s.scanCount, 0) AS scanCount FROM FIXED_RETURN r JOIN FIXED_CATEGORY c ON r.store = c.store AND r.mainBarcode = c.mainBarcode LEFT JOIN FIXED_SCAN s ON r.store = s.store AND r.mainBarcode = s.mainBarcode AND r.uploadDate = s.uploadDate AND s.scanDate = #{scanDate} WHERE r.store = #{store} AND r.uploadDate = #{uploadDate} ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.location IS NULL OR c.location = '' OR c.location = '시즌아웃' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, CAST(c.location AS UNSIGNED), c.location
SELECT DISTINCT DATE_FORMAT(scanDate, '%Y-%m-%d') FROM FIXED_SCAN WHERE store = #{store} AND scanDate BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY scanDate

SELECT r.mainBarcode AS mainBarcode, r.uploadDate AS uploadDate, #{scanDate} AS scanDate, IFNULL(c.product, '') AS product, IFNULL(c.location, '') AS location, r.qty AS returnQty, IFNULL(r.vip, 0) AS vip, IFNULL(r.vipLocation, '') AS vipLocation, IFNULL(s.scanCount, 0) AS scanCount FROM FIXED_RETURN r LEFT JOIN FIXED_CATEGORY c ON c.store = r.store AND c.mainBarcode = r.mainBarcode LEFT JOIN FIXED_SCAN s ON s.store = r.store AND s.mainBarcode = r.mainBarcode AND s.uploadDate = r.uploadDate AND s.scanDate = #{scanDate} WHERE r.store = #{store} AND r.mainBarcode = #{mainBarcode} AND r.uploadDate = #{uploadDate}

SELECT DISTINCT c.store, c.mainBarcode, c.product, c.location FROM FIXED_SCAN s JOIN FIXED_CATEGORY c ON c.store = s.store AND c.mainBarcode = s.mainBarcode WHERE s.store = #{store} AND s.uploadDate = #{uploadDate} AND s.scanDate = #{scanDate} ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.location IS NULL OR c.location = '' OR c.location = '시즌아웃' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, CAST(c.location AS UNSIGNED), c.location
